search_variations: how do I delete my account?
high_quality_answer: To permanently delete your account, go to **Profile > Delete Account**. You must confirm this action by typing 'DELETE' and entering your password. Please note that this action is irreversible and will permanently remove all your transactions, goals, and Vault documents.

search_variations: how do I change my currency?
can I use a different currency?
high_quality_answer: You can change your default currency at any time. Go to **Settings** and select your preferred currency from the dropdown. This will automatically update all your dashboards and historical transactions.

search_variations: what is the maximum file size for uploading a PDF to the vault?
how big can a pdf be?
high_quality_answer: To ensure lightning-fast AI processing, the Vault accepts a maximum file size of exactly **16 MB per upload**. Please compress larger PDFs before uploading them.

search_variations: what file types does the vault support?
can I upload images or word docs?
does the vault accept excel files?
can i upload a csv to vault
high_quality_answer: The Vault supports **PDF (`.pdf`)**, **CSV (`.csv`)**, and **Excel (`.xls`, `.xlsx`)** files. This lets you upload everything from bank statements to transaction exports and chat with your data instantly.

search_variations: how do I export my transactions?
can I download my data as CSV?
high_quality_answer: You can download a financial report directly from the **Analytics page**. Choose from three preset time ranges — **Last 30 Days**, **Last 90 Days**, or **Last 1 Year** — and download it as a report file.

search_variations: how do I reset my password?
I want to update my security settings
high_quality_answer: To change your password, go to your **Profile** and scroll down to the 'Change Password' section. You will need to enter your current password to authorize the change.

search_variations: what features does this app have?
how do I use the dashboard?
explain the main features to me
high_quality_answer:
Arthflow provides several powerful tools to manage your finances:
- **Transactions:** Track your daily income and expenses.
- **Budgets:** Set limits on specific categories.
- **Goals:** Track progress toward savings milestones.
- **Vault:** Upload PDF statements to chat directly with your documents.
If you need further assistance, please reach out to us at **arthflow0@gmail.com**. The AI chatbot is also available to help you navigate features and troubleshoot common problems.

search_variations: what happens if I go over my budget?
do I get penalized for overspending?
high_quality_answer: If you exceed your budget in a category, Arthflow will visually highlight the overspend in red and send you a notification. There are no penalties, but it helps you stay aware of your spending habits!
Hello! I am your AI financial assistant. Since you're logged in, I have secure access to your transactions, budgets, and goals. How can I help you manage your finances today?

search_variations: how do I edit a goal?
can I change my savings target?
high_quality_answer: You can manage your active goals directly from the Goals dashboard. Click the three dots (options menu) next to any goal to edit its target amount, extend the deadline, or delete it entirely if your plans change.

search_variations: how do I mark a bill as paid?
high_quality_answer: Arthflow reminders function as calendar alerts rather than checklists. Once a bill is paid, you can either let the reminder naturally expire after its date passes, or manually delete it from the Reminders dashboard by clicking the three dots next to it.

search_variations: can I increase my budget midway through the month?
high_quality_answer: Yes, absolutely! Financial plans change. You can edit your budget limits at any time during the month by navigating to the Budgets page and clicking the 'Edit' button next to the relevant category.

search_variations: what if I lose my phone for MFA?
high_quality_answer: MFA in Arthflow is delivered via OTP to your **registered email address** — not an authenticator app. If you have lost access to your email, please use your email provider's account recovery. Once back in your email, you can re-enable MFA from **Settings** under the 'Two-Factor Authentication' section.

search_variations: does the AI train on my PDFs?
high_quality_answer: Your privacy is paramount. **Arthflow's AI does NOT train on your uploaded PDFs.** All documents are stored securely in isolated, encrypted MongoDB instances, and the data is only used temporarily during your active chat session to answer your specific questions.

search_variations: how do I log out of other devices?
did I leave my account logged in at work?
high_quality_answer: To secure your account, go to **Settings** and scroll down to 'Active Sessions'. From there, you can view all devices currently logged into your account and click 'Sign Out All' to instantly log them out.

search_variations: how do I log a split expense?
high_quality_answer: Currently, a single transaction can only have one primary category. To log a split expense (like a receipt with both Groceries and Electronics), we recommend adding two separate transactions for the respective amounts on the same date.

search_variations: how do I clear unplanned spending from my budget?
why do I have unplanned expenses?
high_quality_answer: 'Unplanned' spending appears when you log an expense for a category that has no budget set. To clear it, simply go to your Budgets page and create a new budget (even if the limit is small) for that specific category!
You can customize Arthflow's appearance to suit your style! Navigate to **Settings** to switch between Light Mode, Dark Mode, or 'Auto' to match your operating system's theme.

search_variations: how do I delete a PDF from the vault?
high_quality_answer: To delete a document, go to the Vault dashboard. Click on the document you wish to remove, and select the 'Delete' option in the top right menu. This instantly deletes the file and permanently erases all associated AI embeddings.

search_variations: can I undo deleting a transaction?
high_quality_answer: Once a transaction is deleted, it cannot be undone or recovered. However, you can easily add the transaction back manually from the Dashboard using the same amount and date.

search_variations: can I change the date of an expense?
high_quality_answer: Yes! If you made a mistake or want to backdate a transaction, locate it in the Transactions list, click the edit icon, and update the date. Your dashboards and budgets will instantly recalculate.

Goal Priority (High, Medium, Low) is currently a visual organizational tool to help you focus on what matters most. It visually sorts your goals on the dashboard but does not automatically allocate your funds.

search_variations: does my budget rollover to next month?
what happens to extra budget money
high_quality_answer: Arthflow currently uses a strict month-to-month budgeting system. Unused budget amounts do not automatically roll over to the next month, encouraging you to start each month with a fresh plan!

search_variations: can I log expenses in foreign currency?
high_quality_answer: All your transactions and budgets must be entered in your primary default currency. If you travel, we recommend manually converting the foreign expense to your base currency before logging it in Arthflow.

search_variations: what happens if I miss a reminder?
how long do overdue alerts last
high_quality_answer: If you miss a reminder date, it will turn red and be marked as 'Overdue' on your dashboard. It will remain visible as a helpful alert until you manually delete it or edit the date.

search_variations: what happens if I save more than my goal target?
high_quality_answer: If you add funds that exceed your target amount, the visual progress bar will max out at 100% and turn green, but the 'Saved Amount' text will accurately display your total surplus funds!

search_variations: can I share my budget with my spouse?
add a partner to my account
high_quality_answer: Arthflow is currently designed for single-user profiles. There is no formal 'Family Sharing' or joint-account feature at this time. Each person should maintain their own separate account for accurate personal finance tracking.

search_variations: can I export just one month of data?
high_quality_answer: The **Analytics page** lets you download a financial report for three preset ranges: **Last 30 Days**, **Last 90 Days**, or **Last 1 Year**. For a specific month, choose the closest available range and open the downloaded file to filter further.

search_variations: can I pause my account instead of deleting?
high_quality_answer: While there is no formal 'Pause' button, you can simply stop logging in. Your data is completely safe, encrypted, and waiting for you whenever you decide to return. We will never delete an inactive account without notice.
